zh.lifeSummary: 當Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy於1304年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，他的父親Guillaume de Coucy16歲，母親Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne9歲。他於1317年與Marie de Vianden結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年8月26日在法國皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy于1304年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可时，他的父亲Guillaume de Coucy16岁，母亲Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne9岁。他于1317年与Marie de Vianden结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年8月26日在法国皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy was born in 1304, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Guillaume de Coucy, was 16 and his mother, Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne, was 9. He married Marie de Vianden in 1317. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 August 1346, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy est né en 1304, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Guillaume de Coucy, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Vianden en 1317. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 août 1346, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy 1304 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Coucy 16 und seine Mutter Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne 9. Er hat 1317 Marie de Vianden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. August 1346 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy è nato il nel 1304 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Coucy, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Vianden nel 1317. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 agosto 1346, nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucyが1304年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Coucyは16歳，母Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marneは9歳であった。1317年にMarie de Viandenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年8月26日にフランスピカーディソンメクルeシ-エン-プオンスイエウで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy(이)가 1304년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Coucy(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1317년 Marie de Vianden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 8월 26일 프랑스 피카디 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy nasceu em 1304, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Coucy, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Vianden em 1317. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1346, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy родился в 1304 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Coucy было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Vianden в 1317 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 августа 1346 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Enguerrand VI de Guînes-Coucy nació en 1304, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Coucy, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Marie de Vianden en 1317. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1346, en Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
